title: [Crafting] Coding's Recipe & Loot Tweaks
description: The complete collection of crafting tweaks by CodingLegend0100
body:
# Notice This pack has been discontinued in favor of fragmenting it into smaller packs with specific crafting changes. See my [Crafting Tweaks collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/VQZNq4ph) for the full list of crafting data packs. # Custom Recipes ### Bundle Craft bundles with 6 leather and 2 string ### Log to Chest Instead of needing to craft planks to craft some chests, you can skip this step and craft them using logs! ### Log to Stick No more log -> plank -> sticks, simply craft sticks using logs! ### Life Series TNT Changes the recipe of TNT to match that from the Life Series. Uses 4 sand, 4 paper, and 1 gunpowder. # Recipe Changes ### Improved stonecutting ### Cheaper template replication Smithing templates no longer require 7 diamonds to be replicated. Instead, they only require 4 diamonds and 4 of their designated block. ### Improved recycling Vastly increased the number of items that can be smelted for iron/gold. Gold armor (including horse armor) and bells smelt down to a gold ingot.
Iron armor (including horse armor), minecarts, cauldrons, blast furnaces, hoppers, and iron trapdoors smelt down to an iron ingot.
Gold tools, powered rails, and light weighted pressure plates smelt down to a gold nugget.
Chainmail armor, iron tools, buckets, shears, iron doors, iron bars, rails, tripwire hooks, chains, shields, and heavy weighted pressure plates smelt down to an iron nugget.
# Loot table changes ### Gravel to Sand When breaking gravel it now drops flint and sand as a pair ### Enderman Endermen now drop a maximum of 1 ender pearl. Looting increases the chance of them dropping an ender pearl
